title: Grooming
description: Bath, haircut and styling appointments: patient, assignee, site, schedule and status.
search_placeholder: Search by patient, owner, service or notes…

date_filter.aria: Filter by appointment start date and time

empty.no_results_description: Try clearing filters or changing your search.
empty.no_records_description: Create the first one with the “New appointment” button.

fotos.title: Process photos
fotos.hint: Upload photos while the appointment is in progress or when completed, then send them to the owner's WhatsApp.
fotos.empty: No photos on this appointment yet.
fotos.limits: Max. 8 photos · JPG, PNG or WebP · up to 5 MB.
fotos.whatsapp_description: Pending photos will be sent to the owner's phone.

detalle.title: Appointment details
detalle.description: Service summary, owner and process photos.
detalle.fotos_empty: This appointment has no photos yet.

estado_flow.fotos_hint: Max. 8 · JPG, PNG or WebP · up to 5 MB each. You can take, replace or remove before confirming.
estado_flow.fotos_empty: Take a photo or pick from the gallery to send to the owner.
estado_flow.auto_whatsapp: An automatic WhatsApp message will be sent to the owner on confirm.
estado_flow.notify_hint: Includes the status update and any photos you upload.

en_proceso.title: Start grooming
en_proceso.description: Mark the appointment as in progress. You can upload photos and notify the owner.

completada.title: Complete grooming
completada.description: Mark the appointment as done. Upload the final photo and notify the owner.

cancelada.title: Cancel appointment
cancelada.description: The appointment will be cancelled and the owner will get an automatic WhatsApp.

no_asistio.title: Mark as no-show
no_asistio.description: It will be marked as no-show and the owner will get an automatic WhatsApp.

form.duracion_sugerida: Based on the selected type, the schedule suggests {{minutes}} min; you can change it below.
form.estado_hint: Current status: {{estado}}. Use the row buttons (Start / Complete / Cancel) to change it and notify.
form.servicio_hint: Grouped protocols common in practice. If none fit, pick “Custom / other” and describe below.
form.servicio_detalle_placeholder: E.g. miconazole shampoo bath + lion clip…
form.servicio_detalle_hint: Required when type is “Custom / other”. For medicated baths, note product and area here or in internal notes.

delete.title: Delete this appointment?
delete.description: It will disappear from the list (soft delete).

bano_higienico_pelo_largo.label: Maintenance bath (long coat)
bano_higienico_pelo_largo.hint: More drying and light brushing; not a severe dematting slot.

bano_desenredo_liviano.label: Bath with light dematting
bano_desenredo_liviano.hint: Local tangles or early undercoat; not heavy matting.

bano_desenredo_severo.label: Bath with severe dematting / mat removal
bano_desenredo_severo.hint: Book extra time; assess welfare (brush pain). Document in notes.

bano_antiparasitario.label: Anti-parasite bath (fleas / ticks)
bano_antiparasitario.hint: Shampoo/protocol per authorised product in your region. Does not replace systemic treatment if infestation is heavy.

bano_medicado_dermatologico.label: Medicated bath (dermatology)
bano_medicado_dermatologico.hint: Yeast, allergy, seborrhoea: follow veterinary prescription (log product in notes).

bano_cachorro.label: Puppy bath / first experience
bano_cachorro.hint: Short session, gentle handling; no forced drying.

bano_gato.label: Cat bath (feline protocol)
bano_gato.hint: Needs safe restraint; dry-only grooming may be kinder for some cats.

bano_control_odor.label: Odour-control bath
bano_control_odor.hint: Add-on; impacted anal glands usually need a separate protocol.

corte_tijera_completo.label: Full scissor trim
corte_tijera_completo.hint: Blended lengths; check hidden mats before scissoring.

corte_maquina_uniforme.label: Clipper uniform trim / sport clip
corte_maquina_uniforme.hint: Guide-comb lengths; good maintenance for suitable breeds.

corte_higienico_zonas.label: Sanitary tidy (zones)
corte_higienico_zonas.hint: Groin, pads, face, eyes; hygiene without full restyle.

corte_deslanado_strip.label: Strip-style undercoat removal
corte_deslanado_strip.hint: Double coats (e.g. shepherd, golden): watch for skin irritation; avoid marathon sessions.

corte_deslanado_mano.label: Hand-stripping / deep carding
corte_deslanado_mano.hint: Less aggressive than full strip; good middle ground.

trimming_cabeza_patas.label: Head & feet trim (pet tidy)
trimming_cabeza_patas.hint: Refine face, feet and underline while keeping body length.

corte_sanitario_prequirurgico.label: Pre-surgical / field clip
corte_sanitario_prequirurgico.hint: Clip for incision site or hospital prep; coordinate with clinician.

combo_bano_desenredo_corte.label: Bath + demat + haircut
combo_bano_desenredo_corte.hint: Includes pre-brush work; extend appointment duration.

combo_bano_corte_deslanado.label: Bath + haircut + undercoat work
combo_bano_corte_deslanado.hint: Double-coated breeds; may need two visits if undercoat is extreme.

combo_spa_completo.label: Spa bundle (bath + mask + light extras)
combo_spa_completo.hint: Define what your spa package includes in internal notes.

cepillado_seco.label: Dry brush-out (no bath)
cepillado_seco.hint: Between-bath maintenance or cats that do not tolerate water.

limpieza_oidos.label: Ear cleaning (external)
limpieza_oidos.hint: Visible external canal only; otitis cases go to the vet.

corte_unas.label: Nail trim
corte_unas.hint: Include filing if appropriate; watch the quick on pink nails.

limpieza_gl_perianales.label: Anal gland expression / hygiene (external)
limpieza_gl_perianales.hint: Only if in your SOP and tolerated; severe impaction = veterinary.

hidratacion_mascarilla.label: Hydration mask / deep conditioner
hidratacion_mascarilla.hint: After medicated baths or very porous coats.

consulta_pre_estetica.label: Pre-groom consultation (no bath)
consulta_pre_estetica.hint: Assess mats, skin, parasites, realistic time and quote.

otro_personalizado.label: Custom / other
otro_personalizado.hint: Describe clearly what was agreed with the owner.

servicios.title: Service types
servicios.description: Configure grooming services with price and duration. Used when booking and at checkout.
servicios.empty: No services configured yet. Create at least one to schedule appointments.
servicios.empty_turno: Configure at least one active service in the table above first.

errors.en_uso: Cannot delete: appointments use this service.
